case_title: PAWEL GNIEWEK VS. BRENDA LEE PERDUE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2024 BY KATHLEEN A. KELLY. PLAINTIFF OAWEL GNIEWEK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRENDA LEE PERDUE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: KATHLEEN A. KELLY; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$274.27); DOCUMENT STAMPED: (FILED BY FAX) CA RULE 2.303 SERVED OCT-21-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PERDUE, BRENDA LEE
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR JUN-17-2024 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - BRENDA LEE PERDUE - (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE JUN-26-2024 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER VACANT UNABLE TO FORWARD)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2024 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE AUG-20-2024 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-20-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PAWEL GNIEWEK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRENDA LEE PERDUE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE DEFENDANT HAS NOT BEEN MAKING PAYMENTS AND IS REQUESTING A JUDMGNET. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE JUN-26-2024 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER VACANT UNABLE TO FORWARD)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GNIEWEK, PAWEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERDUE, BRENDA LEE $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GNIEWEK, PAWEL AS TO DEFENDANT PERDUE, BRENDA LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$300.15);DOCUMENT STAMPED: (FILED BY FAX) CA RULE 2.303 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GNIEWEK, PAWEL AS TO DEFENDANT PERDUE, BRENDA LEE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-17-2024 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. PLAINTIFF PAWEL GNIEWEK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRENDA LEE PERDUE IS PRESENT. AFTER DISCUSSION WITH THE PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT IS TO PAY PLAINTIFF $100.00 A MONTH BY THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL A TOTAL OF $1800.00 IS PAID TO THE PLAINTIFF THE COURT SETS PROGRESS REPORTS FOR 6/17/24, 12/16/24, & 6/16/25 ALL AT 5:30PM. IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE AT THE 6/16/25 HEARING, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE AND STIPULATED PAYMENT PLAN
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY GNIEWEK, PAWEL PERDUE, BRENDA LEE
